category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a CLI utility for HDR10+ in HEVC files; official GitHub README describes HDR10+ extraction/injection workflows.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide hdr10plus_tool.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best available project documentation; source_facts.homepage points to the same GitHub project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/quietvoid/hdr10plus_tool, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies HDR10+ and HEVC; source_facts.executables lists hdr10plus_tool.
